'''Phedroi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who worked in partnership with [[Vol Hamame]] to seek profit. A [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] with a mucus-lined nasopharynx and dirty ringlet beard, he was responsible for the death of [[Codeq Santhananan]] and wanted part of the reward that could be gained from taking in the corpse of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after intercepting the message via a [[q'nithian mimbrane]] that the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] was still alive. He and Hamame followed [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar's]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] to Fett's location and believed they had the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] holed up before being [[Death/Legends|killed]] under the weight and heat of [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']].<ref name="TMA" />
